2026-04-22T01:45:42.6436168Z [36;1m# Derive GH_HOST from GITHUB_SERVER_URL so the gh CLI targets the correct[0m
2026-04-22T01:45:42.6437199Z [36;1m# GitHub instance (GHES/GHEC). On github.com this is a harmless no-op.[0m
2026-04-22T01:45:42.6437993Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GITHUB_SERVER_URL#https://}"[0m
2026-04-22T01:45:42.6438703Z [36;1mGH_HOST="${GH_HOST#http://}"[0m
